title: 3rd International Symposium On Women In Audio Visual Culture

Publication Opportunities

MENU

The abstracts of the accepted papers will be      published online in the "Congress Abstracts E-Book". There is no      requirement for full text submission to make a presentation at the      symposium.

Papers submitted in full text will be converted      into a book to be prepared within the scope of the symposium.
